package day1;

public class Assigment_Practice2 {

	public static void main(String[] args) {
		// TODO Auto-generated method stub
float f=97.8f;
double y;
y=f;
int s;
s= (int)f;
char b=(char)s;
char t= b;


System.out.println("Float:" + f);
System.out.println("converted to double:" + y);
System.out.println("converted to int:" + s);
System.out.println("character to int value:" + s);
System.out.println("character to character value:" + b);
	}

}
